prompt_text: Open source or affordable marketing automation tools instead of Mailchimp
response:
# Open Source & Affordable Marketing Automation Alternatives

## **Free/Self-Hosted Options**

### **Mautic**
- Open-source marketing automation platform
- Email, SMS, landing pages, lead scoring
- Host on your own server or use cloud
- Great for small teams with technical resources

### **OpenEMM**
- Free, open-source email marketing
- List management, segmentation, automation
- Requires self-hosting and setup knowledge

### **ListMonk**
- Lightweight, open-source newsletter tool
- Clean UI, very affordable self-hosting
- Good for email campaigns (not full automation)

---

## **Budget-Friendly SaaS**

### **Brevo** (formerly Sendinblue)
- **Free plan**: 300 emails/day, unlimited contacts
- SMS, landing pages, CRM basics
- ~$20/month for automation features
- EU-based, strong GDPR compliance

### **ActiveCampaign**
- Starts ~$15/month (basic email)
- Automation, CRM, landing pages
- Better value than Mailchimp at lower tiers

### **HubSpot Free**
- Email, basic automation, CRM
- No contact limits
- Good entry point before paid tiers

### **Klaviyo** (if e-commerce focused)
- Free for up to 250 contacts
- Strong for SMS + email workflows
- Pay-per-contact model

---

## **Other Solid Options**

- **ConvertKit** - Creators/bloggers (~$29/mo)
- **Moosend** - Affordable automation (~$10/mo start)
- **GetResponse** - All-in-one (~$15/mo)

**What's your main use case?** That helps narrow down the best fit.
